provenance.rationale: Round_04 (100-row subset) restored objective variance (std=0.0025) and resolved the residual signal cleanly to a 2-axis interaction: (candidate_k=100, title_cap_rerank_input=1) ALWAYS scores 0.6745 (9/9 trials); every other combination of those two axes scored exactly 0.6695. Importance breakdown: title_cap_rerank_input=0.6389, candidate_k=0.2418, mmr_lambda=0.0986, mmr_k=0.0137, final_top_k=0.007, rest=0. Both winner axes are narrowed in round_05 to their winning value (anti-pattern A11 evidence — deterministic value buckets). Other axes are kept untouched because (a) their importance is low but the 16-trial subset cannot distinguish among them with cand_k+cap_rr varying, and (b) mmr_lambda edges remain UNSAMPLED in round_04 axis_coverage (A10 forbids narrowing). With cand_k+cap_rr fixed at the winner, round_05's importance ranking should reveal whether mmr_lambda / final_top_k / mmr_k / title_cap_final carry any residual signal at the 0.6745 ceiling, or whether the offline study is converged. The wide-MMR-titlecap full-200-row diagnostic context: this study is a sub-grid of the diagnostic at retrieval-wide-mmr-titlecap-20260429-1353, where on the 200-row set the same MMR+cap=2 cells had hit@5=0.74 and MRR=0.6699 — the (cand=100, cap=1) winner here is more aggressive than the diagnostic baseline (cap=2) and yields MRR=0.6745. Whether this 0.0046 MRR uplift transfers to the full 200 rows is the next-question for an out-of-loop confirmation run, not part of this round budget. seed bumped 45→46 to avoid replaying round_04's exact sequence under the narrower space.

diff_summary.evidence: round_04 trials by cand_k: cand_k=100 reached 0.6745 in 9/13 trials (rest at 0.6695); cand_k=200 stayed at 0.6695 in 3/3 trials. param_importance candidate_k=0.2418 (rank 2).

round_04 trials by cap_rr: cap_rr=1 reached 0.6745 in 9/10 trials (the only 0.6695 case had cand_k=200); cap_rr=2 → 0.6695 in 2/2 trials; cap_rr=3 → 0.6695 in 4/4 trials. param_importance title_cap_rerank_input=0.6389 (rank 1).

notes: Final round of the 5-round budget. Both winner-axes narrowed to the unique winning value. mmr_lambda edges still UNSAMPLED in round_04 axis_coverage (A10 forbids narrowing); residual axes left wide to surface signal at the 0.6745 ceiling.
